subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who is named Mahmud and give him glad tidings through the verses of God, the Lord of the Unseen and the Seen. O Mahmud, He maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من سمی بمحمود و نبشره بایات اله مالک الغیب و الشهود یا محمود یذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
